package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_graph_walk_without_seen_set: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag recursive graph or tree walks that do not track visited nodes for cyclic or shared inputs.
type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSet(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSetDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "algorithmic": 3, "complexity": 4, "recursive": 5, "graph": 6}
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    algorithmic_negative_2 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["algorithmic"] + len(input)
    _ = algorithmic_negative_2
    complexity_negative_3 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["complexity"] + len(input)
    _ = complexity_negative_3
    recursive_negative_4 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["recursive"] + len(input)
    _ = recursive_negative_4
    graph_negative_5 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_negative["graph"] + len(input)
    _ = graph_negative_5
    return nil
}
